description_long: This is a tall, slender plastic bottle with a contoured shape, designed for ergonomic handling. The bottle is predominantly white with a glossy finish and features a black screw-on cap at the top. The front label displays a mix of text and graphics, including a swirl pattern and what appears to be a product logo and branding. The sides and back of the bottle are covered with additional printed information, likely ingredients and usage instructions, in smaller text. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments. The bottle appears to be lightweight and portable, ideal for carrying in a bag or placing on a bathroom shelf.
description: A tall, contoured white plastic lotion bottle with a black screw-on cap and decorative printed graphics on the label.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with branding, a swirl graphic, and product information clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the bottle's contoured shape and partial side label with text details.
description_view_2: The back view displays a large block of printed information, likely ingredients and instructions, with minimal graphics.
description_view_3: This angled view highlights the side label and the transition between the front and back graphics.
